mapper.select: SELECT INDIVIDUAL_TARGET_ID, BASE_DATE, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, EVAL_REASON_CODE, EVAL_REASON_DETAIL, RECOVERY_EXPECTED_AMT, DISCOUNT_RATE, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM PRV_INDIVIDUAL_EVAL_TARGET WHERE INDIVIDUAL_TARGET_ID = #{individualTargetId}

SELECT INDIVIDUAL_TARGET_ID, BASE_DATE, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_NO, EVAL_REASON_CODE, EVAL_REASON_DETAIL, RECOVERY_EXPECTED_AMT, DISCOUNT_RATE, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM PRV_INDIVIDUAL_EVAL_TARGET WHERE BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} AND CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId} AND ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
